## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this pull request focused on one change.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated both English and Chinese documentation for user-facing changes.
- [ ] I documented any breaking change and migration path.
- [ ] I verified the relevant commands and browser environments listed above.
- [ ] I followed the [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/zhensherlock/watermark-js-plus/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) and [contribution guide](https://github.com/zhensherlock/watermark-js-plus/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
